languages.text: "The Gaprak scion was killed at Juvenna's instigation. She spurred Camilla Drivestem to act."
languages.original_text: "Наследника Гарпаков убили по наущению Ювенны. Она подтолкнула Камиллу к действиям".

traits.locale_text: "The Gaprak scion was killed at Juvenna's instigation. She spurred Camilla Drivestem to act."

languages.text: “贾帕克家的子嗣是尤文娜指使人弄死的，她怂恿卡米拉·德莱夫斯塔下的手。”
languages.original_text: "The Gaprak scion was killed at Juvenna's instigation. She spurred Camilla Drivestem to act."

traits.locale_text: “贾帕克家的子嗣是尤文娜指使人弄死的，她怂恿卡米拉·德莱夫斯塔下的手。”

languages.text: « L'héritier des Gaprak a été assassiné à l'instigation de Juvenna. C'est elle qui a incité Camilla Drivestem à passer à l'acte. »
languages.original_text: "The Gaprak scion was killed at Juvenna's instigation. She spurred Camilla Drivestem to act."

traits.locale_text: « L'héritier des Gaprak a été assassiné à l'instigation de Juvenna. C'est elle qui a incité Camilla Drivestem à passer à l'acte. »

languages.text: "Gaprak vârisi, Juvenna'nın kışkırtmasıyla katledildi. Juvenna, Camilla Drivestem'i hamle yapmaya sevk etti."
languages.original_text: "The Gaprak scion was killed at Juvenna's instigation. She spurred Camilla Drivestem to act."

traits.locale_text: "Gaprak vârisi, Juvenna'nın kışkırtmasıyla katledildi. Juvenna, Camilla Drivestem'i hamle yapmaya sevk etti."

languages.text: «El heredero Gaprak murió por instigación de Juvenna. Empujó a Camilla Drivestem para que actuara».
languages.original_text: "The Gaprak scion was killed at Juvenna's instigation. She spurred Camilla Drivestem to act."

traits.locale_text: «El heredero Gaprak murió por instigación de Juvenna. Empujó a Camilla Drivestem para que actuara».

languages.text: "Der Gaprak-Spross wurde auf Juvenna Betreiben ermordet. Sie hat Camilla Drivestem angestachelt."
languages.original_text: "The Gaprak scion was killed at Juvenna's instigation. She spurred Camilla Drivestem to act."

traits.locale_text: "Der Gaprak-Spross wurde auf Juvenna Betreiben ermordet. Sie hat Camilla Drivestem angestachelt."

languages.text: 「ギャプラク家の跡取りはジュヴェナに唆されて殺された。彼女はカミラ・ドライブステムを駆り立てたのだ」
languages.original_text: "The Gaprak scion was killed at Juvenna's instigation. She spurred Camilla Drivestem to act."

traits.locale_text: 「ギャプラク家の跡取りはジュヴェナに唆されて殺された。彼女はカミラ・ドライブステムを駆り立てたのだ」
